summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cambridge IELTS 17 Test 4. All 4 skills (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking) are fully functional with correct content. Backend API tests: 24/24 passed. Frontend UI tests: All sections rendering correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Test 4 data file (/app/backend/content/cambridge_tests/ielts17/test4.py) is well-structured with all required sections
All 4 audio files exist and are referenced correctly for Listening parts (test4_part1-4.mp3)
Writing Task 1 line graph image exists and is accessible at /api/cambridge/images/ielts17/test4/test4_writing_task1.png
Speaking section has correct topics: Part 1 (Maps), Part 2 (Doing something in a hurry), Part 3 (Arriving late, Managing study time)
Answer keys complete: 40 listening + 40 reading answers verified
Debug endpoint returns VALID status with no issues
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Test 4 data from test4.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: IELTS 17 Test 4 fully tested. All sections working: Listening (4 parts - Easy Life Cleaning Services, Hotel Staff Turnover, Sporting Activities Discussion, Maple Syrup), Reading (3 passages - Bats to the rescue, Does education fuel economic growth?, Timur Gareyev blindfold chess champion), Writing (2 tasks - line graph about shop closures/openings, opinion essay about alternative medicines), Speaking (3 parts - Maps, Doing something in a hurry, Arriving late/Managing study time). Test URL: /cambridge-test/ielts17/test4. Known bug: Session persistence issue - login required before accessing test directly.

test4_api_endpoint.details: Returns complete test data with all 4 sections

test4_debug_endpoint.details: Returns status VALID with no issues

parts: Part 1: Easy Life Cleaning Services (Q1-10) - note_completion
Part 2: Hotel Staff Turnover (Q11-20) - multiple_choice, matching
Part 3: Sporting Activities Discussion (Q21-30) - multiple_selection, matching

passages: Passage 1: Bats to the rescue (Q1-13) - true_false_not_given, note_completion (5538+ chars)
Passage 2: Does education fuel economic growth? (Q14-26) - section_matching, sentence_completion, multiple_selection
Passage 3: Timur Gareyev – blindfold chess champion (Q27-40) - section_matching, true_false_not_given, sentence_completion

tasks: Task 1: Line graph - Shop closures and openings 2011-2018 (150 words min)
Task 2: Opinion essay - Alternative medicines (250 words min)

parts: Part 1: Introduction and Interview - Topic: Maps (4 questions)
Part 2: Individual Long Turn - Task card: Describe an occasion when you had to do something in a hurry
Part 3: Two-way Discussion - Topics: Arriving late, Managing study time (6 questions)

frontend_question_bank.details: Test 4 card visible and clickable in Question Bank > Full Tests tab with data-testid='cambridge-test-ielts17-test4'

known_issues.session_persistence: Login session may be lost when navigating directly to test URL - user needs to login first. This is a known bug mentioned by main agent.
